safety.disclaimer: This is general well-being guidance, not medical advice.

escalate_if_any.message: Your pain sounds intense and persistent—consider contacting a clinician.
Chest symptoms can be serious—seek urgent care if new or worsening.
New numbness, weakness, or loss of bladder/bowel control—seek medical care.
After an injury, please get checked by a clinician.

principles: Somatic tracking: notice sensations with curiosity and calm interest, not to fix, but to be with them.
Safety reappraisal: remind the brain the sensation is uncomfortable yet not dangerous.
Outcome independence: we practice regardless of immediate relief.
Positive affect induction: sprinkle gentle appreciation/soothing cues.

safety_reappraisal_short: This feels intense, and your attention is strong—that doesn’t mean danger.
Let’s meet the sensation as information, not an alarm.
curiosity_scan_short: Let’s gently watch the edges, intensity, and temperature—just noticing shifts.
See if anything changes with a longer exhale.
outcome_independence_nudge: We’ll practice for its own sake; relief is welcome, not required.
You showed up—that’s the success metric today.
generic: We’ll keep it simple and curious for a minute.
Let’s notice without pressure to change anything.

generic.title: 90-second body scan
steps: Place attention on the most noticeable spot.
If it spreads, follow it with curiosity.

back.title: Gentle spine wave (pain-free range)
steps: Slowly round then lengthen with breath x5.

neck_shoulders.title: Neck soften & shoulder rolls
steps: Roll shoulders back x5 and forward x5.
Ear toward shoulder 10–15s each side (no forcing).

head.title: Jaw & temple release
steps: Tongue to palate; let jaw hang.

prt_additions.title: 60s somatic tracking: observe the edges
steps: Locate the clearest spot of sensation.
Exhale a touch longer than inhale.
Notice any shift—bigger, smaller, same—without chasing relief.

prt_additions.title: 45s safety reminder
steps: Place a hand on the area or heart.
Soft gaze or closed eyes for two slow breaths.
Return to what you were doing, gently.

query_templates.coach_support: somatic tracking steps AND safety reappraisal AND positive affect induction site:{domain}
query_templates.tone_examples: phrases for outcome independence OR curiosity language site:{domain}

sections.instruction: 1 short sentence reflecting region and user_text.
Up to 2 sentences with PRT framing: safety reappraisal + outcome independence, no diagnosis; optionally use language_bank items.
Choose ONE exercise from the selected bucket; up to 4 bullets.
End with the safety disclaimer. If any rule triggers, append the matching escalation message.
